repos.name: Zentrix Pulse
issues: Hardcoded API key in .env.local: VITE_METERED_API_KEY=9870d640b6986088ae89d9391f4d6f31f81f

No server-side API layer; TURN credential fetch happens client-side exposing key to end users

No visible rate limiting on edge functions handling API key validation

passwordValidation.ts uses simple equality check; ensure server-side validation is primary
